task_name: NASA UAP Hearing Data Sources Extraction
notes: Excellent extraction of 35 data sources across all categories with technically accurate descriptions (FAA radar specs, ADS-B coverage, balloon parameters, Five Eyes definition all correct). Limitations thoroughly analyzed: DOD sensor artifacts, FAA filtering effects, iPhone imagery limitations, NASA asset constraints clearly stated. Strong categorical organization with summary table and cross-cutting themes. Minor deductions: duplicate identical files created (data_sources.md and data_sources_1.md), and transcript file included in workspace appears unnecessary. Content is comprehensive and exceeds expectations; presentation is professional. The agent's summary preamble (absent in JSON task) demonstrates good understanding but was unnecessary prose outside the JSON requirement.
